raw_reaction: 天晴れだ　生涯貴様を忘れることはないだろう
reason: The solution treats the original stopping time correctly, proves P(S_n <= 1)=1/n! without a hidden shortcut, and the causal-germ convolution view is a genuine compact explanation of why the uniform cutoff is irrelevant before time 1 rather than decorative renaming.
